overview.description: The Tradr 1X Short Innovation Daily ETF (SARK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, seeking to achieve -1x the return, for a single day, of the Invesco QQQ Trust (QQQ) through swap agreements with major global financial institutions. SARK was launched on Nov 9, 2021 and is issued by Tradr.

data.title: Short-ARK ETF price surpasses ARK Invest's flagship fund after outsized run, but investors are still standing by Cathie Wood
data.text: The ARKK ETF has attracted about $876 million in fund inflows year-to-date, and $619 million in fund inflows since the SARK ETF launched.

data.title: Anti-Arkk ETF creator: We have great respect for Ark's Cathie Wood
data.text: Matt Tuttle, Tuttle Capital Management CEO, joins CNBC's 'Squawk Box' to discuss why he created an ETF that shorts Cathie Wood's tech-focused Ark Innovation fund.

data.title: Jim Cramer weighs in on the Tuttle Capital Short Innovation ETF
data.text: "Mad Money" host Jim Cramer on Thursday discussed the Tuttle Capital Short Innovation ETF and explained how investors can use it to benefit from Wall Street's current stock preferences.

data.title: Jim Cramer says the SARK ETF is trying to benefit from the struggles of high-growth stocks
data.text: CNBC's Jim Cramer discussed the Tuttle Capital Short Innovation ETF and how it capitalizes on Wall Street's dislike of growth stocks.

data.title: Cash Pours Into Anti-ARK ETF as Cathie Wood Struggles
data.text: The Tuttle Capital Short Innovation ETF, which aims to achieve the inverse performance of the ARK Innovation ETF, saw its largest single-day net inflow of cash on Tuesday.

data.title: The ETF betting against Ark's disruptive tech stars has seen AUM soar and returns nearly mirror Cathie Wood's losses since inception
data.text: Since November, Ark's flagship fund has declined by about 32%, while the SARK ETF has gained 39%.

data.title: Tuttle Capital Short Innovation ETF (SARK) Breaks $100 Million AUM Barrier
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $SARK #ETF--The Tuttle Capital Short Innovation ETF (SARK) breaks $100M AUM barrier

data.title: 'Our ETF is a great hedge' against high-growth stock slump: Tuttle Capital CEO
data.text: Matt Tuttle, Tuttle Capital CEO, joins 'TechCheck' to discuss the company's Tuttle Capital Short Innovation ETF, which is up 11% since Nov. 9.

data.title: This Anti-ARK ETF Has Gained 10% in Two Weeks
data.text: The Tuttle Capital Short Innovation ETF, launched in early November, tracks the inverse performance of the ARK Innovation ETF. The former has surged as the latter has struggled.

data.title: This new ETF is betting against Cathie Wood and Ark
data.text: Fund manager Cathie Wood has attracted a large group of loyal investors who watch her every move. But a brand new fund is explicitly betting against Wood and her strategy.

data.title: Tuttle Capital Short Innovation ETF Launches on Nasdaq
